tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Get current Mitosis plans, prices, credit allowances, metered rates, and add-ons. Use when comparing costs or recommending a plan.

tools.name: get_platform_status
tools.description: Get the operational status of the Mitosis website, API, and MCP server. Use before reporting an outage or debugging connectivity.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Keyword-search Mitosis documentation and product pages. Returns ranked results with URLs. Use to answer any "how do I…" question about Mitosis.

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: List the agent skills Mitosis publishes (backup create/list/restore/health/diff/schedule/subscribe) with links to each SKILL.md manifest.
